title: How Olivia can help - Olivia Bailey
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire
headings: h2: Follow Olivia on social media
text_excerpt: How Olivia can help - Olivia Bailey Skip to main content Olivia Bailey Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire Join Get Involved Donate About Olivia How Olivia can help Latest news Parliamentary Tours More Menu How Olivia can help Olivia and her team are working hard to stand up for local people. Get in touch if we can help you. Surgeries Olivia holds regular in person and online surgeries where you can discuss issues where you’d like Olivia’s help. These take place alternate Fridays, but appointments are available at other times if needed. To book a surgery appointment please email olivia.bailey.mp@parliament.uk . Meet Your MP In addition to regular surgeries, Olivia is also holding monthly meet your MP events around the constituency. These are an informal chance to chat to Olivia and discuss local issues. Sunday 23 November, Calcot Sunday 25 January, Aldermaston Sunday 22 February, Tilehurst To register to attend one of these upcoming dates, please email olivia.bailey.mp@parliament.uk . Email or post Olivia and her team of caseworkers are happy to help you with any personal casework or enquiries you may have about the government’s policy. Please email olivia.bailey.mp@parliament.uk and someone will be in touch, or write to me at House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA. We prioritise urgent personal casework so policy emails may take up to four weeks for a reply. Due to strict Parliamentary protocol Olivia is unable to make representations for anyone who does not live within the Reading West and Mid Berkshire constituency. If you do not live in the constituency, you should approach your own MP for assistance. You can check who your local MP is by entering your postcode here: http://www.parliament.uk/mps-lords-and-offices/mps/ Invite Olivia to a meeting If you would like to invite Olivia to visit your business, charity, school, or community initiative or other organisation please do email olivia.bailey.mp@parliament.uk .
